name: couplechat-server
description: Sustainable backend for CoupleChat native clients.

scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/auth/auth.test.ts tests/auth/devices.test.ts tests/auth/couples.test.ts tests/message/message.test.ts tests/message/message-recall.test.ts tests/message/read-receipt.test.ts tests/upload/upload.test.ts tests/sync/sync.test.ts tests/personal-items/personal-items.test.ts tests/ai-memory/ai-memory.test.ts tests/ai-memory/memory-control.test.ts tests/ai-queue/ai-queue.test.ts tests/v2/v2-features.test.ts tests/db/migrations.test.ts tests/db/v10-upgrade.test.ts tests/events/domain-events.test.ts tests/socket/presence.test.ts tests/lifecycle/shutdown.test.ts tests/observability/operation-log.test.ts tests/utils/cursor.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run smoke:postgres
